task.desc: Add a section to README.md titled Quick Start that shows 3 commands to get started with the project

l1.content: {"edit_description":"Add 'Quick Start' section with 3 commands to README.md","target_files":["README.md"],"patch_commands":["sed -i '/^# README.md$/a\\n\\nQuick Start\\n\\n\\n  cd /path/to/project\\n\\n  npm install\\n\\n  npm run start']","validation_commands":["grep -q 'Quick Start' README.md","verify commands":"grep -q 'Quick Start' README.md","expected_outcome":"README.md now contains a 'Quick Start' section with 3 commands","risk_notes":"No new dependencies or code changes","follow_up_type":"none|needs_review"}
